sentences.arabic: يَقُومُ صُنَّاعُ الْمُحْتَوَى بِنَشْرِ مَقَاطِعِ فِيدْيُو مُفِيدَةٍ كُلَّ يَوْمٍ.
sentences.translation: Stvaraoci sadržaja svakodnevno objavljuju korisne video snimke.
sentences.translationEn: Content creators publish useful video clips every day.

sentences.arabic: يُتَابِعُ مَلَايِينُ الْأَشْخَاصِ هَؤُلَاءِ الْمُؤَثِّرِينَ لِتَعَلُّمِ مَهَارَاتٍ جَدِيدَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Milioni ljudi prate ove influensere kako bi naučili nove vještine.
sentences.translationEn: Millions of people follow these influencers to learn new skills.

sentences.arabic: يَبْذُلُ الْمُبْدِعُونَ جُهْدًا كَبِيرًا فِي تَصْوِيرِ وَتَحْرِيرِ الْمَشَاهِدِ.
sentences.translation: Kreativci ulažu veliki trud u snimanje i montažu scena.
sentences.translationEn: Creators put a lot of effort into filming and editing scenes.

sentences.arabic: أَصْبَحَ هَذَا الْعَمَلُ مَصْدَرَ رِزْقٍ لِلْكَثِيرِ مِنَ الشَّبَابِ.
sentences.translation: Ovaj posao je postao izvor zarade za mnoge mlade ljude.
sentences.translationEn: This work has become a source of livelihood for many young people.
